ksa_text: Monitor AI regulatory developments and assess their implications for the enterprise AI system portfolio, producing compliance gap analyses for impacted systems.

dcwf.top_element_label: Ensure that AI design and development activities are properly documented and updated.

nice.top_element_label: Knowledge of automated systems analysis tools and techniques

nist_ai_rmf.top_element_label: AI systems are evaluated for trustworthy characteristics.

top_anchors.element_label: AI systems are evaluated for trustworthy characteristics.
Ensure that AI design and development activities are properly documented and updated.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA AG-T-009 (AG, Task) maps to Citizen Data Scientist scope as weak fit. Composite score 0.5257 clears the weak fit threshold of 0.52. Top framework anchors: nist_ai_rmf=0.526, eu_ai_act=0.484, dcwf=0.404. Seniority fit: appropriate; content reflects IC-to-senior-IC execution work within self-service analytics, business-led data exploration, and low-code BI.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.challenge: weak fit domain KSA AG-T-009 with composite 0.5257 was preliminarily included, but the KSA text contains no direct analytics-domain signals. Internal consistency requires this to be re-examined against ANL scope.
pass_3_adversarial_internal.rebuttal: Composite 0.5257 above the weak_fit threshold of 0.52 but absence of analytics terminology in the AG domain text means the signal is framework-incidental rather than role-specific. Exclusion is more internally consistent with ANL scope definition.
pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: P2 include overturned. AG domain KSA with no analytics text signals at composite 0.5257 does not survive internal consistency review. Revised to exclude.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: External validation: does AG-domain KSA AG-T-009 (composite 0.5257) appear in published data analyst or BI role profiles?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: AG domain content (AI governance, security/privacy, risk management, compliance) is not a primary expectation in IC-to-senior-IC ANL roles per NIST AI RMF; EU AI Act governance obligations; governance competencies are primarily above IC ANL scope. Composite 0.5257 confirms weak signal. Exclusion consistent with published ANL frameworks.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: P3 exclude upheld. External evidence confirms AG domain KSA at composite 0.5257 is not a standard requirement for Citizen Data Scientist at IC-to-senior-IC level.

decision_rationale: Single adversarial overturn by P3 internal consistency. Final decision: exclude. Composite 0.5257, domain AG. Medium confidence — one agent challenged and overturned the preliminary assessment.
